pi_items.source: Verified in task.json description, setup_task.sh line 38, export_result.sh line 26, and verifier.py line 81. All references use this exact path for saving regenerated API keys.
Verified in setup_task.sh lines 28-31 where old keys are saved, export_result.sh lines 16-19 where old keys are read, and task description which references this file for comparison.

privileged_info_summary: The task regenerates API keys for an Emoncms admin account. Output file path is /home/ga/new_apikeys.txt. Reference file containing original keys is /tmp/old_apikeys.txt. API keys are 32-character hexadecimal strings generated using Python secrets.token_hex(16) and stored in a MySQL database. Data is synthetic, generated within the Emoncms Docker environment.
